formulas.name: Purpose of a Notice
formulas.formula: To convey important information to a specific audience
formulas.notes: Use formal language and clear structure

formulas.name: Components of a Notice
formulas.formula: Heading, Body, and Call to Action
formulas.variables: Heading: attention-grabber, Body: information, Call to Action: instruction

formulas.name: Types of Notices
formulas.variables: Informative: general information, Directive: instructions, Advertising: promotional
formulas.notes: Choose the type based on the purpose

formulas.name: Key Features of a Notice
formulas.formula: Clear and concise language, Formal tone, Correct punctuation and spelling
formulas.notes: Follow the guidelines to ensure clarity and effectiveness

formulas.name: Tone of a Notice
formulas.notes: Choose the tone based on the situation
